coverage_note: Round 2 sweep. 30+ line items researched via live WebSearch. All URLs captured. Some URLs (quick-commerce SKUs) are link-rot risks and should be re-fetched monthly or preserved via archive.org.
promo_pricing_warning: Where vendor is running a discount, both discount price AND MRP are recorded. Consumer-facing copy should anchor to MRP or the median across vendors, not the promo floor.

verified.computation: Tetley Green Tea 25 bags ₹144.5 = ₹5.78/bag; Lipton Pure Light 25 bags ₹171 = ₹6.84/bag. Add tulsi ~₹1-2 (kitchen staple).

live_sources.product: Lipton Pure Light Green Tea 25 Pcs

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.notes: Dossier ₹8 is slightly high; true per-cup is ₹6-7 with mass brands, ₹8-10 with organic variants.

verified.computation: BB Super Saver Masoor Dal ₹87/kg → ₹4.35/50g; BB Royal Masoor Dal ₹107/kg → ₹5.35/50g; BB Royal Red Masoor Whole ₹129/kg → ₹6.45/50g. Dal does NOT double in cooking weight for pricing — dry 50g ≈ 150g cooked.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.notes: Dossier ₹7 is defensible; realistic range ₹4-7 for 50g dry. Organic variants ₹10+.

verified.computation: Fortune Kachi Ghani ₹141/L = ₹2.12/tbsp; Patanjali Kachi Ghani ₹200/L = ₹3/tbsp. Cold-press premium ₹250-280/L = ~₹4/tbsp.

live_sources.product: Fortune Premium Kachi Ghani Mustard Oil 1L

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Mustard oil is 30-54% erucic acid. EFSA TDI 7 mg/kg/day easily exceeded at 1-2 tbsp/day. FSSAI permits but ICMR-NIN advises oil rotation. DO NOT ship the biology claim 'mustard oil = EVOO substitute' without erucic-acid warning and rotation advice. See verified_biology.json and safety_layer.json.

verified.computation: Amul Cow Ghee ₹306/500ml = ₹3.06/tsp; Patanjali Cow Ghee ₹355/500ml = ₹3.55/tsp. A2 Kapiva ₹1099/500ml = ₹11/tsp.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Dossier ₹6/tsp only applies to A2 ghee (premium) at HALF the Kapiva price. Regular Amul ghee is ₹3/tsp. Separately: A2 saturated fat = 62%; daily recommendation incoherent with MedDiet framing. Requires ApoB/LDL gating for cardio-risk users. See safety_layer.json.

verified.computation: Fresho Button Mushroom 200g ₹56.5 → ₹14.13/50g fresh. Fresho Oyster Mushroom 200g ₹85.12 → ₹21.28/50g fresh.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Dossier ₹28 is ~35% overstated. But bigger issue: 50g FRESH mushroom ≈ 5g dry. Ergothioneine target ~5mg/day requires ~100g fresh button or ~50g fresh oyster. Dossier 50g/day is likely subtherapeutic for ergothioneine endpoint. SHIITAKE is HIGHER in ergothioneine than oyster (55-90 vs 35-65 mg/100g dry). Dossier's framing 'oyster replaces shiitake adequately' is wrong. See verified_biology.json.

verified.computation: Fresho Amla ₹27.76/500g = ₹2.78/50g; Fresho Pomegranate 1kg ₹242 → ₹121/half kg ≈ ₹12 for half a small pom. Total ~₹15-17.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Amla: Oct-Mar peak; off-season prices ~2x. Pomegranate: Sep-Feb peak. Neither is year-round. Off-season blended average ≈ ₹20-25. See safety_layer.json seasonal section.

verified.computation: BB Popular California Almond 500g ₹449 → ₹22.45/25g; Amazon Vedaka 250g ₹245 → ₹24.5/25g. Wholesale mandi rate ₹980/kg → ₹24.5/25g. BB SUPER SAVER variants as low as ₹900/kg → ₹22/25g.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.notes: Dossier ₹18/25g is ~25% understated. Realistic ₹22-25/25g at retail. Organic/premium ₹30+/25g.

verified.computation: BB Royal Kashmiri Walnut Kernels 500g ₹868 → ₹1,736/kg → ₹26/15g. 100g pack ₹149 → ₹22.35/15g.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Dossier ₹22/15g is accurate for 100g pack size. 500g pack gives ₹26/15g. BIOLOGY CAVEAT: walnut ALA → EPA conversion is 5-10% in humans, <0.5% for DHA. South Asian FADS1/FADS2 polymorphism may further reduce. Walnut ALA does NOT substitute for marine EPA/DHA. See verified_biology.json + safety_layer.json.

verified.computation: True Elements Chia 250g ₹206.5 → ₹82.6/100g → ₹8.26/10g tbsp. BB Royal Organic Chia 500g ₹189 → ₹37.8/100g → ₹3.78/10g. Flax ₹50-100/kg → ₹0.5-1/tbsp. Sesame ₹150/kg → ₹1.5/tbsp.
Akshayakalpa A2 Farm Fresh 500ml ₹53 → ₹10.6/100ml. A2 Pasteurised 500ml ₹45 → ₹9/100ml.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.notes: Dossier ₹18/100ml is 70% overstated. True A2 retail ₹9-11/100ml. Regular cow milk ₹60/L = ₹6/100ml.

verified.computation: Mason & Co 300g estimated ₹1,100-1,200 (need direct fetch) → ~₹11.25/tsp if at upper end, ₹9.4/tsp at lower. Also sold via Urban Platter, Amazon.in, Flipkart, Auroville.

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Flavanol content of Mason & Co, Ariba, Wakao is NOT publicly assayed. FDA 2023 qualified health claim requires ~200mg cocoa flavanols/day for CV benefit. Cannot claim 'matches Blueprint' without independent HPLC assay. Biology-side blocker.

verified.computation: BB Royal Organic Moringa Leaf Powder 100g ₹60 → ₹6; Tiera 100g ₹125; Organic India 100g ₹232. Powder not equivalent to fresh leaves (myrosinase loss).

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: (1) Moringa is a phytoremediation plant — commercial powder has heavy-metal (Pb/Cd/As) variability. FSSAI COA requirement. (2) Dried powder loses myrosinase → glucomoringin→moringin conversion fails in gut. Fresh leaves needed for bioactive yield. (3) Pregnancy contraindication for bark/root extracts. See safety_layer.json.

verified.computation: Rasayanam KSM-66 500mg 60 caps at ₹679 (Blinkit, 32% off) to ₹999 (MRP, Apollo/Flipkart). At 1 cap/day = ₹11.3-16.7/day = ₹339-500/month (bottle lasts 60 days).

indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.notes: DOSSIER ₹350/month IS DEFENSIBLE at 1 cap/day of 500mg (within clinical dose range 300-600mg). Use MRP-based ₹500/month in consumer copy; note promo-variability. Devil's Advocate concern overblown — the ₹350 figure is ~20% below current street price but not 2× as DA claimed.
indian_alternative_daily_stack_prices.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Contraindications: pregnancy, autoimmune (Hashimoto's, lupus), concurrent sedatives. Indian women have high thyroid-disease prevalence — contraindication notice required. See safety_layer.json.

verified.computation: 250g packs range ₹780-1,500 (see verified_prices.json). Per 30g: ₹93.6 (promo) to ₹180 (MRP). Dossier ₹240 is ~33% overstated vs MRP, ~150% over promo.
Fresho Blueberry 125g ₹173 → ₹138/100g; 150g equiv ₹208. Half-cup (~75g) ~₹104. Frozen cheaper. Mixed with cherries increases cost — cherries ₹300-600/kg. Half-cup mix realistic ₹120-200.
Premium shiitake in India ₹600-1000/100g at specialty retailers (Nature's Basket, Gourmet Garden) → ₹300-500/50g. Dried variants ₹400-700/100g. Likely dossier ₹180 understates premium fresh.

bj_replica_prices_india.notes: Shiitake fresh Indian supply is intermittent; dried shiitake imports ₹200-400/50g. Dossier ₹180 probably understates.

verified.computation: Blueprint Longevity Mix $55/30 servings direct = $1.83/serving ≈ ₹156/serving base. Blueprint site states 'price includes taxes and duties for your country' for international orders — but actual landed India price needs cart verification. Indian marketplace resellers (Ubuy) charge higher markup.

bj_replica_prices_india.notes: Dossier ₹387/sachet implies ~₹11,600/mo. Base $55 US = ~₹4,675/mo. Landed India likely ₹7,000-12,000/mo including duty. CLOSE TO DOSSIER but needs verified cart screenshot.

devices_verified.notes: SME FLAG: Ring Air validation studies less published than Oura. Firmware-continuity risk for 3-5yr wear product.
TCO comparison: Oura 2yr = ₹28,900 + (24×₹599) = ₹43,276. Ultrahuman Ring Air 2yr = ₹19,999. Ultrahuman wins TCO by ~₹23,000 over 2yr. Ultrahuman Ring Pro $349-479 (not yet India-launched).
₹4,199 per 2-week sensor = ~₹8,400/month continuous. 12-week bundle (6 sensors) ~₹25,000 on subscription.
devices_verified.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: CGM in non-diabetics is NOT consensus-endorsed (ICMR, Endocrine Society). Postprandial spikes in healthy adults are often physiological. Marketing CGM as a longevity tool without physician interpretation → creates disordered-eating and false prediabetes anxiety. See safety_layer.json.

live_sources.product: DR. PEN Digital Sauna Blanket Far Infrared
prime health Far Infrared Sauna Blanket

devices_verified.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: Sauna blanket (IR, low humidity) is NOT the same physiology as Finnish dry sauna (70-100°C, traditional). Laukkanen mortality data is on FINNISH traditional sauna — DO NOT generalize 40% all-cause mortality to blanket use. Contraindications: uncontrolled HT, pregnancy, cardiac conditions. See safety_layer.json + verified_mortality.json.

live_sources.product: Sellastic Hair Regrowth Laser Cap 272 diodes

devices_verified.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: CDSCO Medical Devices Rules 2017 require registration for therapeutic red-light devices. Sellastic CDSCO status unverified. App should only link to CDSCO-registered devices OR frame as 'cosmetic/lifestyle' not medical. See legal_layer.json.

live_sources.product: Fit India Full Body Checkup 89 tests
Aarogyam Advanced 78 tests (UTSH + Vit B + cardiac + Zn/Cu)

labs_verified.notes: Dossier's '100+ biomarker panel 2-4× per year' replicates at Indian labs for ₹1,200-2,500 per panel. 4 panels/yr = ₹5,000-10,000. For ApoB + Lp(a) + Vit D + hormones additions, see other lab records.
CRITICAL for Indian users: Lp(a) high-level is disproportionately common in South Asians. Recommend testing ONCE in adulthood — it's genetically determined, so one test is sufficient.

labs_verified.unit: 6-14 test hormone panel (T, cortisol, thyroid, DHEA)

MRI Whole Body Screening Delhi NCR

labs_verified.notes: HOD's ₹15,999 for Delhi is an outlier; typical is ₹22,500-30,000. Premium facilities (Mahajan, Apollo) top end ₹80,000.

labs_verified.unit: DunedinPACE epigenetic clock via India partner

live_sources.note: Dry blood spot kit, shipped from India to TruDiagnostic USA lab

labs_verified.notes: AIWO is the Indian fulfillment partner for TruDiagnostic. 2x/yr cadence as dossier implies = ~₹60,000/yr. Report also includes OMICm age, immune age, telomere length, inflammation.

supplements_verified.CRITICAL_REGULATORY_CORRECTION: Devil's Advocate review flagged NMN as 'not FSSAI-listed' and implied illegality. FACT-CHECK: FSSAI uses self-regulation for dietary supplements — NMN is NEITHER on a prohibited list NOR required to be pre-approved. NMN is sold legally in India by Decode Age (Indian company) via Amazon/Flipkart/1mg/HealthKart. Additionally, in September 2025 the US FDA reversed its 2022 position and confirmed NMN is legal as a dietary supplement. So the dossier's inclusion of NMN for reference is acceptable; recommending Decode Age specifically is on firm regulatory ground. The CAUTION remains: human RCT evidence for NMN on meaningful longevity endpoints is still weak (biomarker > outcome evidence). Use 'research-stage intervention' framing, not 'proven'.
